title: The Ghost of Yotsuya
actors: Tomisaburô Wakayama, Akemi Tsukushi, Chieko Sôma
plot: Oiwa has been searching for the one who killed her father for a long time. She comes to Yedo and sees a man named Naosuke. The film is based on the kabuki classic: Toukaidou Yotsuya Kaidan (1826) written by Tsuruya Nanboku and is ...
